releases.description:
###    🚨 Breaking Changes

- Hide `remove-extra-spaces` setting item  -  by @GoodbyeNJN [<samp>(a410e)</samp>](https://github.com/GoodbyeNJN/obsidian-plugin-prettier/commit/a410e3d)

###    🚀 Features

- Add methods to string util  -  by @GoodbyeNJN [<samp>(fbc6e)</samp>](https://github.com/GoodbyeNJN/obsidian-plugin-prettier/commit/fbc6edd)
- Remove unused type definitions  -  by @GoodbyeNJN [<samp>(71e7a)</samp>](https://github.com/GoodbyeNJN/obsidian-plugin-prettier/commit/71e7af4)
- Add patch for prettier to remap languages  -  by @GoodbyeNJN [<samp>(b98d0)</samp>](https://github.com/GoodbyeNJN/obsidian-plugin-prettier/commit/b98d009)
- Add support for remapping languages  -  by @GoodbyeNJN [<samp>(189a2)</samp>](https://github.com/GoodbyeNJN/obsidian-plugin-prettier/commit/189a2cd)
- Add migration feature for plugin data  -  by @GoodbyeNJN [<samp>(78cd6)</samp>](https://github.com/GoodbyeNJN/obsidian-plugin-prettier/commit/78cd6b5)

###    🐞 Bug Fixes

- Adjust button size  -  by @GoodbyeNJN [<samp>(22e5f)</samp>](https://github.com/GoodbyeNJN/obsidian-plugin-prettier/commit/22e5f84)

#####     [View changes on GitHub](https://github.com/GoodbyeNJN/obsidian-plugin-prettier/compare/1.1.0...2.0.0)
